task_name: Implement A3C and PPO and train on Pendulum-v1

subtask1.query: Read workspace/query.md and implement A3C and PPO from scratch, then train both on Gymnasium Pendulum-v1. Ensure the Actor maps actions to [-2, 2], PPO uses a clipped surrogate objective with GAE, and A3C uses multiprocessing async updates with n-step returns. Training should converge to an average reward of at least -300 within 500-1000 episodes.
deliverables: train.py - Training entry script, supports --algo a3c|ppo
a3c.py - A3C training implementation (multiprocessing, global network, n-step)
ppo.py - PPO training implementation (GAE, clip objective, mini-batch multi-epoch)
models.py - Shared Actor-Critic model, Actor output scaled to [-2, 2]
utils.py - Logging, checkpoint, and TensorBoard utilities
README.md - Dependency installation and run instructions
